Footer.about: RJMK has been a household name in metal recycling for years. Short communication lines, honest weighing, and transparent daily prices.

Homepage.heroDesc: RJMK is your reliable partner in Venlo for buying scrap iron and all kinds of metals. We offer a fast collection service, fair weighing prices, and free container placement for large volumes.
Homepage.servicesDesc: From collecting scrap metal to large-scale container placement for businesses. RJMK offers a complete solution for all your metal waste.
Homepage.service1Desc: We quickly and professionally collect your scrap metal in Venlo and the surrounding areas. Exclusively available for both private and corporate clients.
Homepage.service2Desc: Purchasing of all types of non-ferrous metals such as copper, brass, aluminum, lead, and zinc against the best daily prices.
Homepage.service3Desc: Free placement of containers for your metal waste. Ideal for construction sites, demolition work, and industrial companies.
Homepage.service4Desc: Specialized in business clearances and the dismantling of heavy racking or machines. We safely take all industrial metal waste and dismantling work off your hands.
Homepage.pricesDesc1: At RJMK we believe in doing honest business. That is why our purchase prices are directly linked to the current rates of the London Metal Exchange (LME).
Homepage.pricesDesc2: This ensures you always get the best and fairest price for your scrap iron, copper, aluminum, and other metals. We secure a fast financial settlement. Large batch? Contact us for a special project price.
Homepage.regionDesc: From our branch in Venlo, we serve the entire region. Click on your location for more information about our services near you.
Homepage.aboutP1: We are a specialized metal recycling company in the Venlo region that has been a solid choice for years when it comes to buying and selling scrap metal. We pick up from both private and business clients. To make the collection of your metal waste as efficient as possible, we offer free container or bin placement on site.
Homepage.aboutP2: Thanks to our own fleet and transport service, we are highly flexible and guarantee short waiting times for the collection of your materials. Are you looking for a partner with years of experience who acts quickly and reliably? We are happy to help.
Homepage.aboutP4: Are you curious about the possibilities or would you like more information without obligation? Please feel free to contact us.
Homepage.ctaDesc: Do you regularly have metal waste? We place a custom container for free. Full? One phone call and we will swap it within 24 hours.

circulaire-kracht-rood-koper.title: The Circular Power of Red Copper
circulaire-kracht-rood-koper.summary: Discover how red copper is 100% recycled indefinitely without degradation.
circulaire-kracht-rood-koper.content:
Copper is one of the few materials on Earth that can be 100% recycled without any loss of its properties or conductivity. This capacity for infinite recycling is why red copper commands an extremely high residual value on the London Metal Exchange (LME).

According to international estimates, up to 80% of all copper ever mined is still in use today. From a sustainability perspective, copper recycling is essential: converting scrap copper into new material requires about 85% less energy than mining copper ore.

In regions with strong industrial and logistics infrastructures, such as Venlo, specialized recycling companies play an indispensable role by efficiently returning copper scrap from demolition and installation work back into the supply chain. This not only provides local businesses with transparent financial settlements but also directly reduces the global carbon footprint.

staal-meest-gerecyclede-materiaal.title: Steel: Most Recycled Material
staal-meest-gerecyclede-materiaal.summary: Why scrap steel is the absolute backbone of global heavy industry.
staal-meest-gerecyclede-materiaal.content:
Scrap iron and steel form the backbone of metal recycling worldwide. Steel is the most recycled material globally, partly due to its magnetic properties, which make mechanical separation extremely efficient.

Using scrap steel in blast furnaces instead of iron ore and coal saves approximately 74% of the energy normally required, resulting in massive reductions in CO2 emissions. A modern steel plant continuously uses scrap iron as the base layer for new production.

Especially in construction, demolition, and logistics machinery around Venlo, massive amounts of scrap are generated. Reliable collection services and tightly coordinated container placements ensure that this 'secondary steel' is shredded, sheared, and transported to foundries in record time. It is a cycle built purely on factual efficiency.

loodaccus-slagingspercentage.title: Lead Batteries: 99% Success Rate
loodaccus-slagingspercentage.summary: The unprecedented success story of safely recycling toxic industrial lead batteries.
loodaccus-slagingspercentage.content:
Although lead-acid batteries are classified as hazardous waste (chemical waste) due to toxic lead and battery acid, they paradoxically represent one of the biggest success stories in the recycling industry. In Europe, nearly 99% of discarded lead-acid batteries are successfully recycled today.

During the mechanical processing, batteries are crushed in basins. The heavier lead components drop to the bottom, while the plastic casing (usually polypropylene) floats to the surface. Meanwhile, the sulfuric acid is safely drained and chemically neutralized into harmless residue and water.

Both the recycled lead and the plastic casing become the primary raw materials for producing brand-new batteries. Because strict environmental legislation regulates their intake and processing, it is crucial to collaborate with certified collection stations in the Venlo area that strictly adhere to safe disposal protocols.
